title: IDA strings window — busybox glibc constraint strings (part 1)
html:
IDA strings view of busybox_1_21_1 — long glibc assertion strings (int_no <= ..., cannot enable executable stack, DST not allowed in SUID/SGID programs). Same homework as the May 19/20 reverse-engineering captures.

ida pro · busybox · reverse engineering · cs coursework
